setup.instructions: Choose the installation language from the menu, then click the button to run setup phases.
setup.inGuildOnly: This action can only be used in a server.
setup.adminOnlyLanguage: Only the server owner or an administrator can change the installation language.
setup.adminOnlyInstall: Only the server owner or an administrator can rerun the installation.
setup.contextReinstallDesc: Guardian was previously installed on this server. Do you want to keep the existing settings or start fresh?
setup.contextGuardianPartialDesc: Guardian channels or categories were found without a complete installation. Do you want to integrate Guardian into this structure or reset everything?
setup.contextExistingDesc: This server already has roles or channels. Guardian can integrate with your existing structure or start from scratch by creating its own roles and channels.
setup.contextReinstallOption1: **Keep** : Guardian uses your existing settings and restarts services.
setup.contextReinstallOption2: **Reconfigure** : full wizard, Guardian recreates its structure from scratch.
setup.contextExistingOption1: **Link** : Guardian adapts to your existing roles and channels (manual mapping in the wizard).
setup.contextExistingOption2: **Fresh install** : Guardian creates its own roles and channels.
setup.resetSuccess: Reset complete. Guardian is starting fresh.
setup.integrateSuccess: Integration complete. Guardian has adapted to your existing structure.
setup.autoMappedNone: ℹ️ No roles could be detected automatically by name. You will need to map them manually in the wizard.
setup.installError: Error while rerunning installation. Check bot logs.
setup.forbiddenNotOwner: Only the setup owner can interact with this wizard.
setup.step1Instructions: Map each Guardian grade to a Discord role. Roles define access permissions to each section of the server.
setup.step1RenameDesc: The 5 Guardian grades were created automatically. Click a grade to rename it, or continue with the default names.
setup.step1NoRolesDesc: No roles were found on this server. Guardian can automatically create the 5 required roles (Invite, Member, Moderator, Manager, Owner), or you can create them manually and come back.
setup.step2Instructions: Enable or disable optional Guardian features. You can change these at any time from the configuration panel.
setup.step3Instructions: Select an existing channel for each slot, or let Guardian create it automatically. Required channels cannot be skipped.
setup.step4Instructions: Configure how new members are welcomed and the promotion conditions from Invite to Member.
setup.step5Instructions: Guardian automatically creates a private voice room when a member joins the creation channel. Configure the name, limit and lifetime here.
setup.step6Instructions: Define your community's games. Guardian creates dedicated channels and automatically publishes Steam updates if a Steam ID is provided.
setup.step7Instructions: Configure the server's automatic protections: behavioral score, anti-spam, slow mode and banned word list.
setup.step8Instructions: Review your configuration before finalizing. Guardian will create all channels, configure permissions and activate all selected modules.
setup.step8ConfirmWarning: This action is irreversible: Guardian will create channels, configure permissions and activate all selected modules.
setup.validationMissingMappings: Missing grades: {{grades}}. Assign a role to each grade before continuing.
setup.validationDuplicateRoles: Two grades cannot share the same role.
setup.validationOwnerRoleMissing: Owner role not found on the server.
setup.validationOwnerCardinality: Owner role must be assigned to exactly 1 member (current: {{count}}).
setup.freshDesc: Guardian found no existing roles, channels or configuration that could be used. You are starting from a clean server.
setup.guardianPartialTitle: Guardian installation detected but not finalized
setup.guardianPartialResume: Guardian started installing on this server but was never finalized. Click the button below to complete the setup.
setup.step5NotReady: You must complete all steps before finalizing.
setup.finalizeNotReady: You must complete all steps before finalizing.
setup.finalized: Installation complete! Guardian is now active.
setup.summary:
🎉 **SETUP COMPLETE — Guardian is now active on {{guild}}!**

👥 **Grades & Access**
Guests can request to become Member after **{{delay}}h**.

⚙️ **Next steps for admins**
1️⃣ Go to `#rules` and customize the server rules
2️⃣ Go to `#faq` and fill in frequently asked questions
3️⃣ Go to `#configuration` → `#channels` to fine-tune permissions
4️⃣ Add your games and configure voice channels in `#configuration`

📚 **Resources**
• `#faq` — Frequently asked questions
• `#statut-bot` — Bot status and logs
• `/help` — Guardian command help

Good luck! 🚀

interaction.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

messageCreate.forbiddenWord: {{user}}, this message contains a forbidden word.

members.welcome: Welcome {{member}} to **{{guild}}**! Click the request button to become a member. You can be promoted after {{delay}}h.
members.dmWelcome:
Welcome to **{{guild}}**!

You have joined as a Guest. To become a Member and access the full community, you will need to submit a promotion request.

⏱ You can apply after **{{delay}}h** on the server.

Head to **#bienvenue** to get started!

promotion.notInvite: This action is reserved for Invites.
promotion.delayNotReached: You must wait {{remaining}} more hours before applying.
promotion.sponsorshipRequired: A sponsorship is required before applying.
promotion.pendingExists: You already have a pending request.
promotion.requestSubmitted: Your request has been sent to the staff.
promotion.requestAlreadyHandled: This request has already been handled.
promotion.bioModalLabel: Introduce yourself in a few words
promotion.reviewerForbidden: You do not have the required grade to handle this request.
promotion.targetMissing: The target member could not be found.
promotion.acceptedDm: Your request has been accepted. Welcome among the members!
promotion.rejectedDm: Your request has been rejected. Reason: {{reason}}

reports.panelText: Report a member via the Guardian form.
reports.submitted: Your report has been sent to the staff.
reports.alreadyHandled: This report has already been handled.

games.title: Guardian - My game list
games.noneConfigured: No games configured on this server.

settings.gameChannelsHint: Guardian Interface: use the **gamelist:open** button to configure your game channels.
settings.gameListHint: Guardian Interface: click **gamelist:open** then select your opt-in games.

automod.ownerOnly: This action is restricted to the owner.
automod.slowSelectHint: Select a channel from the list to configure slow mode.
automod.slowDisabledAll: All slow modes have been disabled.
automod.slowInvalidValue: Invalid value. Must be between 0 and 21600.

behavior.ownerOnly: This action is restricted to the owner.
behavior.panelHint: Add thresholds to automate sanctions based on score.
behavior.invalidScore: Invalid score. Must be a positive integer.
behavior.scoreListEmpty: No members with a recorded score.

config.managerOnly: This action is restricted to Managers and Owners.
config.ownerOnly: This action is restricted to the Owner.

changelogs.title: Steam Changelog Settings
changelogs.invalidFrequency: Invalid value. Must be between 5 and 1440 minutes.

jeux.title: Per-Game Configuration
jeux.noGames: No games configured on this server.
jeux.hint: Select a game to edit its settings.

serveursJeu.title: Monitored Game Servers
serveursJeu.hint: Add servers to monitor them automatically.

roles.title: Guardian Roles
roles.hint: Edit the name or color of each grade role.
roles.notMapped: Grade {{grade}} is not mapped to a role.
roles.roleNotFound: Role not found on the server.

init.faq1: Guardian FAQ: use the setup channel to initialize server modules.
init.faq2: Guardian FAQ: Invite/Member/Moderator/Manager/Owner roles drive permissions.
init.faq3: Guardian FAQ: for support, open a request in #demandes.
init.voiceCreate: Guardian Voice: join this text channel to create your temporary voice channel.
init.serverPlaceholder: Guardian Placeholder: this channel is reserved for the future Pterodactyl server management bot.
init.welcomeInfo: Welcome to the server! Read #regles, check the #faq and open a request in #demandes to become a member.
init.rules:
**Server rules**
1. Stay courteous and respectful.
2. No spam or forbidden content.
3. Follow the guidance of Moderators and Managers.
init.announcements:
**Announcements**
Official server announcements will be posted here.
init.suggestionsIntro: Share your ideas to improve the server by creating a new post.

topics.general: General discussion channel for the community.
topics.requests: Requests — submit your applications and requests to the team.
topics.serverList: Community game server list — automatically updated by Guardian.
topics.suggestions: Suggestions — share your ideas with the team via this forum.
topics.welcome: Welcome — Guardian greets new members here.
topics.rules: Server rules — read and follow the rules before participating.
topics.annonces: Official announcements — news and updates from the team.
topics.faq: Frequently asked questions — find answers to common questions.
topics.voiceCreate: Create your temporary voice channel by clicking the button below.
topics.voiceGeneral: Main voice channel — join to chat with the community.
topics.voiceAfk: AFK channel — inactive members are automatically moved here.
topics.becomeMember: How to become a Member — server rules, how to apply and stay active.
topics.joinServer: Why join our server — discover the community and the benefits of being a Member.
topics.reports: Member reports — Guardian logs reports submitted via /signaler here.
topics.autoModeration: Auto-moderation logs — Guardian records automatically detected violations (spam, blacklist…).
topics.behavior: Behavior score — Guardian displays warnings and sanction history here.
topics.moderation: Guardian moderation logs — sanctions, bans, warnings and team actions.
topics.validation: Request validation — Guardian displays pending member requests awaiting approval.
topics.moderationLogs: Guardian moderation logs — sanctions, promotions, team actions.
topics.securityUpdates: Discord security updates — visible to Manager and Owner only.
topics.gameChannels: My game channels — each member can manage their game channel opt-ins here.
topics.gameList: My game list — displays the games the member participates in.
topics.serveurs: Community servers — proposals and list of community game servers.
topics.botConfig: Bot configuration — status, active modules and general Guardian settings.
topics.membres: Member management — access rules, sponsorship and promotion configuration.
topics.channelsConfig: Channel configuration — permissions and channel structure management.
topics.vocauxConfig: Voice configuration — prefix, suffix, limit and delay for temporary voice channels.
topics.jeux: Game configuration — add, edit and remove server games.
topics.configLogs: Guardian config logs — history of all configuration changes.
topics.roles: Guardian role configuration — grade mapping Invite/Member/Moderator/Manager/Owner.
topics.guardian: Guardian main control panel — owner access only.
topics.serverManagement: Server management — reserved for the future Pterodactyl control system.
topics.setup: Guardian configuration channel — reserved for server administration.

help.overviewDesc: Guardian is an all-in-one bot for gaming communities. Pick a module below to learn more.

notifications.panelDesc: Configure private message alerts sent to the relevant roles. Critical notifications are enabled by default.

cat.botUpdateDesc: DM sent to Owner/Manager when Guardian restarts with a new version.
cat.botErrorDesc: DM sent on fatal error or unhandled exception.
cat.setupIncompleteDesc: Reminder to the Owner if the configuration wizard is not finalized.
cat.moderationAlertDesc: DM to Moderators/Managers for major automatic sanctions (auto-ban, flood…).
cat.memberJoinDesc: DM to Owner/Manager each time a new member joins.
cat.promotionRequestDesc: DM to the team when a Guest submits a Member promotion request.
cat.serverStatusDesc: DM to Owner/Manager when a monitored game server goes offline or comes back online.
cat.steamUpdateDesc: DM to Owner/Manager when a new Steam changelog is published for a configured game.

guildCreate.dmBody: Thanks for inviting Guardian. A private setup channel has been created just for you.
guildCreate.dmLinkFallback: ➡️ Look for the **#setup** channel in your server to get started.
guildCreate.dmFooter1: > The setup channel is only visible to you and the server owner.
guildCreate.dmFooter2: > It takes about 5 minutes to configure Guardian for your server.

roleSecurity.title: ## 🔐 Role Security Audit
roleSecurity.intro: Guardian detected existing roles that need your attention before continuing.
roleSecurity.dangerousIntro: > These roles have permissions that may represent a security risk.
roleSecurity.unusedIntro: > These roles have no members. You can delete or keep them.
roleSecurity.footer: > Issues are still present. Fix them or click **Continue** to skip.
roleSecurity.footerResolved: > All issues resolved. Click **Continue** to proceed.
roleSecurity.introResolved: All detected issues have been addressed. You can continue.
roleSecurity.modalWarning: ⚠️ Security issues are still present. You can continue, but note that some roles may pose a risk.
roleSecurity.deletePermissionError: ❌ Guardian doesn't have permission to delete these roles. Go to **Server Settings → Roles** and move the **Guardian** role above the roles to delete.
roleSecurity.modalCancelled: Continuation cancelled. You can fix the issues before continuing.
roleSecurity.modalInvalid: Incorrect confirmation word. Type exactly CONFIRM to continue.
roleSecurity.modifyEphemeral:
🔐 **Edit role @{name}**
> Go to **Server Settings → Roles → @{name}** to change its permissions.
